gaps.finding: Post-onboarding dashboard first paint may not show auto-assigned coaching mode because profile context is refreshed after saveOnboarding but before pipeline patches coaching list

critiques.finding: completeOnboarding refreshes profile after initial save but not after runOnboardingProfilePipeline; DASH-02 preferredCoachingMode stays null on first dashboard visit despite Supabase row containing patched ai_coaching_mode_list_list_option_ai_coaching_mode_os.
critiques.alternative: Await useUserProfile().refresh() (or return merged onboarding_data from pipeline) after runOnboardingProfilePipeline in completeOnboarding.ts before navigate to /dashboard.

critiques.finding: bTIEN IR slice exposes seven ChangeThing action ids but not per-action conditions; React consolidates into resolveAiCoachingModes + single patchOnboardingAndResults — semantic parity assumed from classification/pressure/fingerprint mapping, not verified action-by-action against drsam-99657.bubble.
critiques.alternative: Add unit tests with fixture inputs per classification_os + pressure/fingerprint edge cases, or extract bTIES action conditions from bubble and document expected ordered list outputs.

critiques.finding: No tests cover resolveAiCoachingModes branch matrix (classification pairs, System Overload protector prepend, overwhelm stabilizer prepend, simplifier fallback).
critiques.alternative: Add focused vitest cases in frontend/src/test/ mirroring API-01/API-02 calculator test pattern when introduced.

critiques.finding: calculateUserAiCoachingMode also patches ai_coaching_mode_os singular field to last list entry; DASH-02 readPreferredCoachingMode reads list field only — redundant but consistent with adminAnalyticsApi fallback.
critiques.alternative: Document singular field as legacy mirror or omit if list field is canonical per DASH-02.
